description: Agent governance and command-graph cleanup: lean AGENTS execution-guardrail block under Critical Rules across three files, canonical intake consolidation via shared intake-contract.md + /spec_kit:plan --intake-only, and hard-delete of deprecated /spec_kit:handover + /spec_kit:debug + @handover + @speckit middleware with distributed-governance replacement.
